description: The largest collection of free utility API tools for AI agents — 200+ tool configurations across 11 REST endpoints and 12 MCP tools. QR codes, passwords, UUIDs, hashing, Base64, lorem ipsum, JSON processing, color conversion, email verification, IP geolocation, timestamp conversion.
